rationale: Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id entity_nyc-dot, which exists in the registry as 'NYC DOT as Publisher' (entity_type: agency). The block text 'NEW YORK CITY DOT' on page 13 matches the registry's entity_name 'New York City Department of Transportation'. Per rule, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.

rationale: Same real-world project: Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave Select Bus Service converting B44 Limited to SBS from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay in Brooklyn. The observation's base_record_id (project_nostrand-rogers-sbs-cb3) and target (project_nostrand-rogers-sbs) share identical project_name, project_type (Select Bus Service), borough (Brooklyn), status (proposed), and core description (B44 Limited → SBS, Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay). They differ only in source: the target record aggregates multiple CB presentations (CB15, CB1, CAC slides) while the observation comes solely from the CB3 presentation. Same corridor, same route conversion, same planning phase.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave Select Bus Service
